data.title: TODEFULL Wagon Stroller for 2 Kids, Foldable Kids Wagon Cart Featuring with Harnesses, Adjustable Double Push Handle, Removab
data.summary: DOUBLE WAGON STROLLER: Heavy steel frame for 2 passengers (55 LBS per seat); This cleverly designed station wagon stroller is easy to fold for storage, is also capable of transporting oversized loads and fits in the trunk for easy transportation | ADJUSTABLE DOUBLE PUSH BAR: the
